title: File:Helix, v.4, no.1, Jul. 3, 1968 - DPLA - f85d3098cc68c08d343df4ec801de4f2 (page 13).jpg
creator: Dorpat, Paul
credit: File URL IIIF manifest Catalog record
description: Cover: Eagle/tv/fist/bodies, by Walt Crowley. Page 5 article discusses rally at Garfield High School turning violent after the trial of Aaron Dixon, Larry Gossett, Richard Gossett and Carl Miller who participated in a sit-in at Franklin High School after the suspension of Trolice Flavor. Page 15 article features Black Panther Party Minister of Information Eldridge Cleaver.
